name: YouTubePlus
subtitle: Enhanced YouTube for iOS
description: YouTubePlus is a feature-rich, sideloadable YouTube tweak for iOS. Ad blocking, background playback, PiP, Return YouTube Dislikes, 4K unlock, player gestures, and 30+ customization options.

apps.name: YouTubePlus
apps.subtitle: Enhanced YouTube with ad blocking, PiP, and more
apps.localizedDescription:
YouTubePlus is a modded YouTube client for iOS. Fork of YTLitePlus, modernized and actively maintained.

Features:
• Ad blocking (video, banner, native)
• Background playback
• Picture-in-Picture (YouPiP)
• Return YouTube Dislikes
• 4K/UHD quality unlock (YTUHD)
• Configurable player gestures (volume, brightness, seek)
• Tap-to-seek on progress bar
• SponsorBlock-ready overlay framework
• Version spoofer (v20+ default)
• Theme customization & OLED dark mode
• Export/import settings
• 30+ toggleable features

Requires sideloading via AltStore or TrollStore. No jailbreak needed.

versions.localizedDescription:
YouTubePlus v21.06.2-5.2 — YTLite 5.2 stable upgrade.

• Upgraded YTLite 5.2b4 → 5.2 stable
• Latest entitlement fixes for free Apple Developer account sideloading
• Rebuilt from latest main with full tweak audit

First release of YouTubePlus.

• YouTube 21.06.2 with YTLite 5.2b4
• Fixed version spoof — bumped to v20.08.6 (YouTube now requires v20+)
• Removed YTNoModernUI version hook that was causing forced update screen
• Rebranded from YTLitePlus to YouTubePlus
• Full tweak audit and documentation

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: This lets you add your own audio files to your videos.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: YouTube needs bluetooth access to scan for nearby Cast devices.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you create videos using the app.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Your contacts will be sent to YouTube servers to help you find friends to share videos with.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Access to your network allows YouTube to discover and connect to devices such as your TV.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This enables local content discovery, improved recommendations, and enhanced search results.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you include audio with your videos and search using your voice.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload media you've already created.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: To personalize ads and provide ad measurement, YouTube will link activity from this app with activity from non-Google apps and websites.

news.caption: YouTube 21.06.2 with YTLite 5.2b4 — version spoof fix, rebranding, and full tweak audit.
